examples.title: FBO Creation and Setup
examples.description: Complete procedure to create framebuffer with color and depth attachments
examples.explanation: This code creates an FBO with a color texture attachment (for reading in shaders) and a depth renderbuffer (for depth testing). The completeness check ensures the FBO is properly configured before use.

examples.title: Off-screen Rendering to FBO
examples.description: Rendering scene to FBO then displaying with post-processing
examples.explanation: Pass 1 renders the 3D scene to the FBO's color texture. Pass 2 samples that texture on a full-screen quad and applies fragment shader effects (blur, bloom, etc.) before displaying.

examples.title: Framebuffer Blit Operation
examples.description: Copying between framebuffers for multisample resolution
examples.explanation: glBlitFramebuffer copies pixels between framebuffers. For multisampled FBOs, blitting with GL_NEAREST effectively resolves (downsamples) the multisample buffer to a regular texture.

examples.title: Double Buffering Swap Implementation
examples.description: Demonstrates double buffer concept in rendering loop
examples.explanation: Double buffering ensures complete frames are displayed. The swap operation exchanges front (displayed) and back (drawn) buffers. V-sync ensures swaps align with monitor refresh.
